title: angiopteris arborescens
intro: Angiopteris arborescens, also known as the tree fern, is a type of plant that belongs to the family Marattiaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Angiopteris arborescens include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, making it a popular herbal remedy in various cultures. Herbal preparations of Angiopteris arborescens can be made into tea, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
